title: srd-builder Build Report (build_report.json)
description: Per-build provenance payload written to dist/build_report.json alongside the bundle directory. Carries the timestamp and Python version so the bundle itself can stay byte-deterministic. The 'bundle' field links the report to the ruleset directory it produced.

bundle.description: Bundle directory name (e.g. 'srd_5_1'). Matches the subdirectory under dist/.

ruleset.description: Ruleset identifier (e.g. 'srd_5_1'). Equals 'bundle' today; reserved as distinct field in case a single ruleset ever produces multiple bundles.
